name: Special Room Generator
author: b62c2cffcb8be30d
command:
// ========================= // SPECIAL ROOM GENERATOR // Sandbox Generator // ========================= function roll(sides) { return Math.ceil(Math.random() * sides); } function pick(table) { const r = roll(table.length); return { roll: r, result: table[r - 1] }; } // ------------------------- // SPECIAL ROOM TYPES // ------------------------- const specialRooms = [ "Boss Chamber", "Ancient Shrine", "Artifact Vault", "Hidden Treasury", "Faction Headquarters", "Prison", "Laboratory", "Library", "Forge", "Puzzle Chamber", "Portal Room", "Observatory", "Throne Room", "Ritual Chamber", "Burial Chamber", "Arena", "Council Chamber", "Great Hall", "Secret Garden", "Collapsed Wonder" ]; // ------------------------- // DETAILS // ------------------------- const roomFeatures = { "Boss Chamber": [ "Ancient monster", "Dungeon ruler", "Corrupted hero", "Powerful beast", "Necromancer", "Cult leader" ], "Ancient Shrine": [ "Forgotten god", "Nature spirit", "Ancestor worship", "Sun deity", "Death cult", "Lost religion" ], "Artifact Vault": [ "Legendary weapon", "Ancient crown", "Magical relic", "Lost spellbook", "Sacred artifact", "Ancient key" ], "Hidden Treasury": [ "Coins", "Gems", "Jewelry", "Trade goods", "Art objects", "Mixed wealth" ], "Faction Headquarters": [ "Bandits", "Cultists", "Goblins", "Mercenaries", "Rebels", "Adventurers" ], "Prison": [ "Wrongfully accused prisoner", "Monster captive", "Lost explorer", "Political prisoner", "Traitor", "Important NPC" ], "Laboratory": [ "Alchemy", "Necromancy", "Clockwork", "Magical research", "Biological experiments", "Portal studies" ], "Library": [ "Dungeon history", "Forbidden lore", "Maps", "Spellbooks", "Royal records", "Monster research" ], "Forge": [ "Weapon forge", "Armor forge", "Runic forge", "Ancient machine", "Dwarven forge", "Master craftsman forge" ], "Puzzle Chamber": [ "Runes", "Levers", "Pressure plates", "Statues", "Mirrors", "Musical puzzle" ], "Portal Room": [ "Another dungeon", "Another region", "Another plane", "Lost civilization", "Ancient battlefield", "Unknown destination" ], "Observatory": [ "Stars", "Moon", "Planets", "Prophecy", "Comet", "Ancient celestial event" ], "Throne Room": [ "Dead king", "Undead ruler", "Vacant throne", "Ancient dynasty", "False ruler", "Magical throne" ], "Ritual Chamber": [ "Summoning", "Sacrifice", "Blessing", "Transformation", "Binding", "Resurrection" ], "Burial Chamber": [ "Hero", "King", "Saint", "Warrior", "Sorcerer", "Unknown figure" ], "Arena": [ "Monster fights", "Gladiators", "Trials", "Executions", "Training", "Beast hunts" ], "Council Chamber": [ "Ancient rulers", "Guild leaders", "War council", "Religious leaders", "Nobles", "Faction leaders" ], "Great Hall": [ "Feasting", "Celebration", "Military gathering", "Coronation", "Religious gathering", "Political meeting" ], "Secret Garden": [ "Rare plants", "Healing herbs", "Strange mushrooms", "Ancient tree", "Magical flowers", "Hidden spring" ], "Collapsed Wonder": [ "Broken statue", "Collapsed bridge", "Ruined machine", "Lost monument", "Destroyed temple", "Fallen tower" ] }; // ------------------------- // TWISTS // ------------------------- const twists = [ "Still active", "Partially destroyed", "Recently disturbed", "Guarded", "Trapped", "Hidden", "Flooded", "Haunted", "Magically protected", "Abandoned" ]; // ------------------------- // REWARDS // ------------------------- const rewards = [ "Treasure", "Useful information", "Shortcut", "Magic item", "Faction ally", "Safe resting place", "Secret passage", "Quest hook", "Unique resource", "No obvious reward" ]; // ------------------------- // ROLLS // ------------------------- let roomRoll = pick(specialRooms); let roomType = roomRoll.result; let featureRoll = pick(roomFeatures[roomType]); let twistRoll = pick(twists); let rewardRoll = pick(rewards); // ------------------------- // OUTPUT // ------------------------- let output = `

Special Room Generator

Room Type

Roll: d20 = ${roomRoll.roll}

Type: ${roomType}

Feature

Roll: d6 = ${featureRoll.roll}

Feature: ${featureRoll.result}

Twist

Roll: d10 = ${twistRoll.roll}

Twist: ${twistRoll.result}

Reward

Roll: d10 = ${rewardRoll.roll}

Reward: ${rewardRoll.result}

Quick Summary

This special room is a ${roomType}. Its defining feature is ${featureRoll.result.toLowerCase()}. The room is ${twistRoll.result.toLowerCase()}. Exploration may reveal ${rewardRoll.result.toLowerCase()}.

`; ChatMessage.create({ speaker: ChatMessage.getSpeaker(), content: output });
